# 📖 The Index of Spells

**234 spells** across **12 houses**. Generated by the Rite of Transcription — do not edit by hand.

> **Do not read this whole tree into context.** To find a spell, *grep* the per-house catalogues in `_index/` (or `catalog.json`) for a capability or name — grep returns only what matches, so the Book stays light no matter how large it grows.
